title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: Flawless TGE execution, spot market euphoria, and the conviction tax in Hyperliquid
summary_description: Community reflects on the smoothest token launch ever, why people faded the airdrop, and what comes next for staking and EVM.

key_moments.label: PBR participated in TGE with one eye open after drinking
TGE execution was flawless—no platform hiccups despite massive volume
Hyper Pump auctions scaled from 30-40 to 100k+, demand wild
Proposal: move Hyper Pump pools to hype denomination for compounding
Some people declined NFT airdrops thinking it was a trick
Key edge: believing Jeff and team were actually high-integrity and altruistic
TGE deadline drama: people missed sign-off despite a month to accept terms
Guest credits Hyper Hour spaces for pushing him all-in before TGE
